query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_payouts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dealId) as deals_with_payouts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT aeId) as aes_with_payouts,
  SUM(netCommissionGbp) as total_gbp,
  SUM(netCommissionUsd) as total_usd,
  MIN(payoutYear * 100 + payoutMonth) as earliest_payout,
  MAX(payoutYear * 100 + payoutMonth) as latest_payout
FROM commission_payouts
